zh.Harewood House, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾希亞活 豪斯
zh.Fordham, Cambridgeshire, England: 英國坎布利其爾福達哈姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice de Lisle於大約1337年出生在英國越可爾希亞活 豪斯時，她的父親John de Lisle21歲，母親Maud de Grey19歲。她於1355年3月13日之前與Robert de Holand VI結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1402年在英國藍卡爾享年67歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可諾維其。

zh-hans.Harewood House, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾希亞活 豪斯
zh-hans.Fordham, Cambridgeshire, England: 英国坎布利其爾福達哈姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice de Lisle于大约1337年出生在英国越可爾希亞活 豪斯时，她的父亲John de Lisle21岁，母亲Maud de Grey19岁。她于1355年3月13日之前与Robert de Holand VI结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1402年在英国藍卡爾享年67岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可諾維其。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lisle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Northumberland, Durham, and Yorkshire): variant of   Lyle   and a cognate of 2 below.
French: habitational name from L'Isle or Lisle, names of several places in various parts of France, named with Old French isle ‘island’ (from Latin insula). Compare Delisle .

variants.name: Lyle
meanings: Scottish and English (of Norman origin): topographic or habitational name from Anglo-Norman French del isle ‘from the island’ (from Latin de insula), denoting someone who lived on an island or who came from a place in France named Ile, Isle, or L'Isle. The surname may also in some cases be from Lille (Nord). Compare Lisle and Iles .

variants.name: Lile
meanings: English and French: variant of   Lisle  .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice de Lisle was born about 1337, in Harewood House, Yorkshire, England, her father, John de Lisle, was 21 and her mother, Maud de Grey, was 19. She married Robert de Holand VI before 13 March 1355. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died about 1402, in Lancashire, England, at the age of 67, and was buried in Norwich, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice de Lisle est née environ 1337, à Harewood House, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, John de Lisle, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Maud de Grey, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Robert de Holand VI avant 13 mars 1355. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1402, à Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterrée à Norwich, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice de Lisle um 1337 in Harewood House, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Lisle 21 und ihre Mutter Maud de Grey 19. Sie hat vor 13. März 1355 Robert de Holand VI geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1402 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Lancashire, England und wurde in Norwich, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Lisle è nata il circa 1337 nel Harewood House, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, John de Lisle, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Maud de Grey, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Robert de Holand VI prima del 13 marzo 1355. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì circa 1402, nel Lancashire, England, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolta a Norwich, Norfolk, England.

ja.Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイア
ja.Norwich, Norfolk, England: イギリスノーフォルクノーウィチ
ja.Harewood House, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアハーエウッド ホーウゼ
ja.Lancashire, England: イギリスランカシュアイア
ja.Fordham, Cambridgeshire, England: イギリスカンブリジェシュアイアフォードハム
ja.lifeSummary: Alice de Lisleが約1337年にイギリスヨークシュアイアハーエウッド ホーウゼで生まれた時，父John de Lisleは21歳，母Maud de Greyは19歳であった。1355年3月13日以前にRobert de Holand VIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1402年にイギリスランカシュアイアで67歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクノーウィチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice de Lisle(이)가 대략 1337년 영국 요르크실르 하레우드 허스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Lisle(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud de Grey(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1355년 3월 13일 이전 Robert de Holand VI(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1402년 영국 랭카실르에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 노위치에 묻혔다.

mg.about 1337–about 1402: tany ho any amin'ny 1337–tany ho any amin'ny 1402

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Lisle nasceu aproximadamente 1337, em Harewood House, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Lisle, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Maud de Grey, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert de Holand VI antes 13 de março de 1355. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1402, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 67 anos, e foi sepultada em Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice de Lisle родилась около 1337 г. в местности харюуд хоус, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John de Lisle было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Maud de Grey, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Holand VI перед 13 марта 1355 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1402 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 67 лет и была похоронена в местности норвич, норфолк, Англия.

sm.about 1337–about 1402: e tusa o le 1337–e tusa o le 1402

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice de Lisle nació aproximadamente 1337, en Harewood House, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Lisle, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Maud de Grey, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Robert de Holand VI antes de 13 de marzo de 1355. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1402, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultada en Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
